qa_pairs.question: When was the Niagara compute cluster retired?
qa_pairs.answer: The Niagara compute cluster was retired on September 30, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What guidance is available for users migrating from the retired Niagara compute cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For users migrating from the retired Niagara compute cluster, guidance is available in the "Transition from Niagara to Trillium" document.

qa_pairs.question: What actions should users take for new work after the Mist compute cluster was retired?
qa_pairs.answer: After the Mist compute cluster was retired on September 16, 2025, users should transition new work to Trillium and consult the "Trillium Quickstart" guide.
